themes.reasoning_notes: It specifically rewards drawing your second card each turn, a classic card-draw payoff rather than a draw engine itself.
Its reward is placing +1/+1 counters on itself, but it supports counters decks only lightly and mostly as a self-scaling threat.
Triggers specifically on your second card drawn each turn, making it a clear card-draw payoff; the +1/+1 counter is the reward, not a counters-matter hook.
